10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001010010010 - ASI: 28

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  100 = 1 * 00
  0010 = 00 * 10
  0011 = 00 * 11
  1001 = 100 * 1
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1011 = 10 * 11
  1110 = 11 * 10
  11011 = 1 * 1011
  0000011 = 000 * 0011
  0011100 = 0011 * 100
  00100011 = 0010 * 0011
  10010010 = 1001 * 0010
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  11100010 = 1110 * 0010
  111011011 = 1110 * 11011
  00110011100 = 0011 * 0011100
  101100100011 = 1011 * 00100011
  1110001010010010 = 11100010 * 10010010
  11101101111100010 = 111011011 * 11100010
  000001100110011100 = 0000011 * 00110011100
  10101010101100100011 = 10101010 * 101100100011
  0000011001100111001110001010010010 = 000001100110011100 * 1110001010010010
  1010101010110010001111101101111100010 = 10101010101100100011 * 11101101111100010
  10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001010010010 = 1010101010110010001111101101111100010 * 0000011001100111001110001010010010
